title: gilibertia cuneata var. ramiflora
intro: Gilibertia cuneata var. ramiflora, also known as New Zealand tea tree, is a plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Gilibertia cuneata var. ramiflora include its ability to soothe and calm skin irritations, reduce fever, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers are often used to make teas, infusions, and topical creams, making it a popular natural remedy in traditional medicine.
